title: lophatherum gracile var. annulatum
intro: Lophatherum gracile var. annulatum, also known as Chinese club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the lycopodiopsida family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lophatherum gracile var. annulatum include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
